prompt:
Scene:
A square synthetic fashion model identity card in a clean studio, neutral gray backdrop, softbox lighting, and catalog-quality styling. The card shows one full-body front pose and two small side-detail insets, all of the same fictional model, with no readable labels.

Subject:
A fictional adult model with oval face, warm medium-brown skin tone, short natural black curls, distinct straight eyebrows, almond-shaped dark eyes, small beauty mark under the left eye, lean athletic build, and relaxed upright posture. The model wears a simple baseline outfit: fitted black crewneck, straight-leg charcoal trousers, white low sneakers. The face, hair, body proportions, skin tone, and posture should be crystal clear for future identity locking.

Important details:
Photorealistic fashion catalog lighting, accurate anatomy, consistent face across the main pose and insets, crisp garment edges, neutral styling, no dramatic expression, no heavy makeup. The image should function as a synthetic reference card for identity preservation, not a celebrity portrait.

Use case:
Root reference image for a virtual try-on identity-lock series. Later images should preserve this exact synthetic model identity while changing only clothing and styling context.

Constraints:
Fictional adult model only, no real person likeness, no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no changing face between insets, no distorted hands or feet, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Reference Model Card
description: A synthetic model identity card establishing face, body, skin tone, hair, and baseline outfit.

generation.runner_notes: Root synthetic identity reference for the virtual try-on series.
